typecheck.output: Success: no issues found in 51 source files

reviewsSummary.note: All features reviewed in round 1. No new features or fix features requiring re-review.

rejectedObservations.observation: PsychUpdate records not integrated into memory context building for future AI responses
rejectedObservations.reason: This is design-level - the system creates records and context building exists separately. This is future work for a follow-on milestone, not a bug.

rejectedObservations.observation: No enforced 0-3 fact limit in semantic assertions
rejectedObservations.reason: The limit is a design goal but not enforced - the current implementation returns facts as extracted. Non-blocking as core functionality works.

rejectedObservations.observation: Belief category defined but not extracted
rejectedObservations.reason: Non-blocking - other categories (goal, preference, pattern) are extracted and core functionality is working.
